raw_consumer_statement:
Nine charges on my card in early XX/XX/year> were not made by me. All charges were made in North Carolina. I live in Connecticut. AE credited my statement with seven charges. The other two they said the card was present. 
I only have one card, which was in my possession the entire time in CT. 
I have not authorized anyone else to use my card. AE is requiring me to pay these bogus charges.
